atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports bilateral numbness and tingling in fingers, with pain in the wrist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a gradual onset of numbness and tingling in his fingers over the past few months.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports this as worsening at night.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports this often requiring shaking to alleviate the sensation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports this is accompanied by wrist pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the symptoms are most prominent when waking up.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports performing yard work and landscaping daily, involving repetitive motions and heavy lifting.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any history of rheumatoid arthritis or similar conditions.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient drinks approximately two beers on Friday and Saturday evenings.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals diminished grip strength on the left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals a notable weakness in the left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals positive Tinel's signs bilaterally.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation of the left wrist reveals tenderness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports dropping objects due to decreased sensation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a wrist splint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ibuprofen 600 mg every six hours as needed for pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an EMG.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: We will schedule a follow-up appointment in two weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends modifying his landscaping work to reduce repetitive motions.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician suggests exploring lighter work options.
